sizing_rule.note: Size positions based on confidence/certainty of edge (marginal profit probability), NOT on win/loss streaks or recent performance. Avoid streak-based adjustments; use certainty of profit edge as primary sizing determinant. Author (Vince) does not specify numeric parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown) in this excerpt.

source_rule_text: Do not attempt to optimize position sizing based on win/loss streaks; instead, maximize the certainty level of marginal profit rather than maximizing system profits through bet size adjustments.
